task_intents: adding a new step to a workflow
example_tasks: Add new item to recurring grocery list
Add another iteration to the sprint plan
Update project timeline with new milestones
Add more capacity to server cluster
Add a new step to the onboarding workflow
Add more rows to the data table
Add another review cycle to the document
Add new tasks to the backlog
reasoning: The icon combines a curved arrow (implying cycle or repetition) with a plus sign (implying addition or increase). It is highly effective for tasks involving recurring items, scaling, or adding steps to an existing process.
